LanguageData.MIL_GlobalWindows: Skin large windows with the Morrowind theme
LanguageData.MIL_SettingsBlurb: This version focuses on the Morrowind style menu presentation only. It replaces the pawn gear tab with a tabbed inventory, equipment, and stats layout while keeping normal RimWorld trading, hauling, and stockpile behavior untouched.
LanguageData.MIL_DebugTraderVisitBlurb: Dev Mode only. Forces a friendly trader caravan to visit your current settlement map.
